_comment: MCP server templates for SGridworks projects. Copy relevant entries to your project's .claude/settings.json under 'mcpServers'. Keep under 10 active per project.

context7._comment: Real-time library documentation lookup. Install: npm install -g @context7/mcp-server

mcp-visualization-duckdb._comment: DuckDB-powered data analysis and visualization. Install: pip install mcp-visualization-duckdb
